qt_add_library(QQS_Components STATIC)

qt_add_qml_module(QQS_Components
    URI QtQuick.Studio.Components
    CLASS_NAME QQS_ComponentsPlugin
    QML_FILES
        ArcItem.qml
        TriangleItem.qml
        SvgPathItem.qml
        RectangleItem.qml
        StraightArrow.qml
)
